title: Keep every action hermetic
description: Make each build action depend only on declared inputs and the toolchain Bazel controls, so results are reproducible and cacheable anywhere.
body: Use when writing or fixing a rule or genrule that touches files or tools. Do not read from absolute paths, the network, or undeclared system binaries. Actions: declare every input in srcs or deps; pin the toolchain so the host compiler is not used implicitly; avoid embedding timestamps or machine paths in outputs. Validation signals include identical outputs on two machines and high remote-cache hit rates across clean checkouts. Risk boundary: a non-hermetic action poisons the cache with machine-specific results, so treat any undeclared input as a defect to fix, not tolerate.
